name: Pocket Sized Hands
short_description: Dundee co-development studio specialising in porting, live ops, and networking across PC, console, and mobile
about: Pocket Sized Hands is a Dundee-based co-development studio that lives by a simple idea: take the projects others think aren't possible and knock them out of the park. Founded in 2017, the team brings deep experience across Unity, Unreal, and Godot, and has shipped on every major platform — PlayStation, Xbox, Switch, and mobile. Their work spans the full spectrum of co-development: porting, live ops, multiplayer networking (using Photon, EOS, and custom AWS stacks), and full-cycle development. Credits include Oddworld: Soulstorm, Bendy and the Dark Revival, Gestalt: Steam & Cinder, and Pocket Mortys, alongside clients from Adult Swim to Numskull Games.
